scope: Family-wide dogfood: repo-audit-skills (repo-A), repo-audit-refactor-optimize (repo-B), perf-benchmark-skill (repo-P). All audit skills run on the whole skillset.

lanes.code-health: run (complexity, dead-code, duplication, structure, quality) on all 3 repos
lanes.perf-smell: run on all 3 repos (scoping bug found + fixed)

deferred: Default-mode (no --source-prefix) leaf file-walk still globs untracked dependency dirs (.venv/node_modules); only manifests on repos with a local virtualenv. Out of scope for this run (the dogfood scopes positively); recorded as a hardening candidate.
coverage_gated: repo-A coverage gate: pass (10/10 cheap + 1/1 heavy)

batches.change: run_diagnosis_wave.py: add 'perf-smell' to the source-scoping lane set in _append_scope_args so the lane honors --source-prefix (was globbing the whole tree, incl untracked .venv, hanging the wave).
batches.verification: 34/34 wave tests pass; 318/318 repo-B suite pass

batches.change: Pruned 10 stale perf-smell accept entries under tests/ from .repo-audit/accept.json (the fix scopes perf-smell to scripts/, so those test-file findings no longer exist).
batches.verification: convergence gate pass: 26 accepted, 0 active, 0 stale

batches.change: Pruned 3 stale perf-smell accept entries (tests/ + benchmarks/) from .repo-audit/accept.json for the same reason.
batches.verification: convergence gate pass: 45 accepted, 0 active, 0 stale

repo-audit-skills.run_checks: pass (10/10 cheap gates + 1/1 heavy coverage gate, 0 failed)

warnings: Changes are uncommitted in the working tree. The perf-smell fix lives in repo-B's run_diagnosis_wave.py; repo-B and repo-P convergence gates pin the runner at v0.8.1 in CI. To land in CI, repo-B needs a runner release and repo-P needs a runner re-pin, plus committing both accept.json prunes.

Local environment was completed to match CI: installed pinned bandit/pylint/perflint/mutmut/hypothesis/jsonschema into repo-A's .venv; symlinked ~/.agents/node_modules -> repo-A/node_modules so the installed duplication leaf can find jscpd (the install process never creates node_modules beside the leaf).
Coverage-gap baselines show count 0 / baseline 0 on repo-B and repo-P; that is the gate's converged state, not a missing measurement.
